work_unit: triage skipped tests: replace 8 vague TODO:fix skip reasons with descriptive event-bus refactor context
situation: scout-scan ranked browser-use #1 (score=2.68) due to GATES.md pending merge, no planning/, and 34 TODO/FIXME markers. The primary cluster was 8 skipped integration tests in tests/ci/infrastructure/test_registry_action_parameter_injection.py all using reason='TODO: fix' — an opaque marker that tells future developers nothing about why they were skipped or what to fix. One test (test_get_scroll_info) had a redundant second @pytest.mark.skip decorator on top of a descriptive one.
action: Replaced all 8 generic 'TODO: fix' skip reasons with specific descriptions that identify the API surface to verify post event-bus refactor (SecurityWatchdog constructor, get_current_page_url/title, refresh, execute_javascript, take_screenshot, tab operations, Registry.execute_action). Removed the redundant @pytest.mark.skip(reason='TODO: fix') duplicate decorator from test_get_scroll_info — kept the descriptive 'get_scroll_info API changed' reason. Committed to opt-browser-use-1782664160 worktree via opt-worktree.sh.
outcome_evidence: git log in opt-browser-use-1782664160 shows commit 0b66a45 'opt(browser-use:test-triage): triage: replace 8 vague TODO:fix skip reasons...'; grep on worktree file shows all 8 skip markers now have descriptive reasons (no remaining 'TODO: fix'); duplicate @skip on test_get_scroll_info removed (was 2 decorators, now 1).
next_suggestion: 1) Human review + merge browser-use/opt-browser-use-1782664160 (test-triage changes); 2) Next loop: shizi (score=2.2, GATES.md pending merge opt-docs-1782657987, 1 TODO) — triage the 1 TODO; 3) skills (score=2.08, 5 TODOs) — triage 1-2 TODOs
